title: Derpy Celestials: No Phases
description: Gives the sun and moon a derp face.
body:
## About
A simple and straightforward texture pack, "Derpy Celestials" changes the appearance of Minecraft's sun and moon to derp-faced versions of themselves. In this case, the moon has no phases, meaning that no matter the night, it will always look "full" and have a complete derp face.

Remembering a similar Bedrock edition pack, I first searched for an existing Java one but to no avail. In the end, I made my own! I hope you enjoy it. For a pack that includes moon phases, click [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/derpy-celestials).

---

*Made using [Microsoft Paint 3D](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9NBLGGH5FV99?hl=en-gb&gl=EN)*
